name: CANNAPHARMARX, INC.
summary: CannaPharmaRx, Inc. (CPMD) specializes in the acquisition, development, and operation of cannabis cultivation facilities in Canada. Operating a 55,000 sq ft indoor cannabis farm in Cremona, Alberta with 10 growing rooms, the company produces and sells dried cannabis flower and trim shake. It sells to markets in Germany, Israel, Canada, and Portugal, and is pursuing EU-GMP certification to enable direct EU shipments.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
